app.name: A11yFred
app.tagline: He taupanga rapuhia, ārahi AI-tuarua, mō ngā kitenga āheitanga hei tāruarua tere ki ngā pūrongo ā-ringa
search.label: Whakaahua i tāu i kite ai
search.placeholder: hei tauira, pātene kati aihaka, kāore he ingoa āhei
search.hint_live: Ka puta ngā hua i a koe e tuhi ana.
search.hint_submit: Tuhia he whakaahuatanga ā tāia Rapu, Enter rānei.
search.hint_platform: E whakaaturia ana ngā kitenga {platform} ināianei.
search.hint_ai: Kei te mahi te āwhina AI ({provider}).
search.hint_voting: Vote results up or down to change their ranking — starred results always appear first.
results.no_results_announce: Kāhore he hua mō '{query}'. Whakamātauria he ingoa wāhanga, momo huānga, rānei he kīanga kē atu.
results.no_results_body: Whakamātauria he ingoa wāhanga (tauira: 'pātene'), momo huānga (tauira: 'tāuru'), rānei he kīanga kē atu.
detail.location_placeholder: hei tauira: Katoa: / Kete: / Ngā whārangi taipitopito hua:
detail.refine_hint_ai: Whakaahuatia tāu mea e hiahia ana ki te huri, ā, ka tūāhua anō te AI ā ka whakaurua ōu whakahoutanga rānei taipitopito. Hurihia tōu tauira AI rānei whakawetohia tēnei i roto i
detail.refine_hint_no_ai: Whakatikahia ngā kūwaha o runga tonu, tuhia ngā hurihanga ki konei rānei. Whakahohea te AI ki
detail.refine_hint_no_ai_suffix: ā ka tuhituhi anō i runga i āu tuhipoka.
detail.refine_placeholder_ai: hei tauira: mō te pūkoro anake tēnei, he tooltip te huānga
detail.refine_placeholder_no_ai: Tauira: "Ka kitea ngā Kitea o te taumata Matua pēnei i tēnei puta noa i te Rerenga Whakauru. He tūāhuatanga ka kitea ngā take taumata iti ake i muri i tō rātou whakatikanga."
detail.rewriting_aria: E tūāhua ana mā te AI
detail.rewrite_aria: Tiakina te tuhipoka ā tūāhua anōtia ngā kōwae kōwhiria mā te AI
detail.nothing_to_copy_body: He takakau tēnei kūwaha. Kāore he mea tāruarua.
detail.confirm_reset_body: He nui ōu hurihanga ki tēnei kuputuhi. Mā te tōrua ka mukua ōu tāruatanga katoa.
settings.heading: Ngā Tautuhinga
settings.language_desc: Ka huri aunoa ki te reo o tō pūtirotiro.
settings.live_search_on: Ka puta ngā hua i a koe e tuhi ana.
settings.live_search_off: Ka puta ngā hua i te Rapu / Enter.
settings.ai_enable_desc: Ka whakatikatika i ngā Whakaahuatanga me/rānei ngā Tūtohu Whakatika e ai ki āu Tohutohu AI.
settings.privacy_body_1: I tēnei wā, ka penapena katoa ā-rohe i roto i tō pūtirotiro mā te localStorage. Kāhore he mea tukuna ki a mātou, ki tētahi tūmau rānei. Ko ngā raraunga penapena ko ēnei: kaupeka, reo, tātari papatūānuku, tautuhinga Kimi Ora, manatū kaiwhakarato AI, ngā kī API, rarangi, whetū, ngā mea kēngia, ngā mea tāreia, ngā kitenga tata, ngā kitenga ritenga, ngā whakatikatika ā-tangata, me tō kitenga whakatuwhera whakamutunga.
settings.privacy_body_2: Ka penapena ngā kī API i roto i tō pūtirotiro anake, ā, ka tukuna tōtika ki te kaiwhakarato AI kua tautuhia e koe. Kāore mātou e kite ana, e whiwhi ana rānei i ērā. Ka taea e koe te tango i ēnei āhea noa atu i ngā tautuhinga AI i raro nei, mā te ūkui rānei i ngā raraunga tūnga pūtirotiro mō tēnei whārangi.
settings.privacy_body_translations: Ko ngā whakamāoritanga UI me te huinga tūārangi tūmatanui i whakamāoritia mā te AI, ā, ka āhua hē pea. Kāhore he raraunga tāurua, ngā kitenga ritenga, ngā whakatikatika whaiaro rānei e tukuna ana mō te whakamāori.
settings.reduced_motion_note: Kei runga te neke iti iho. Ka prétéritehia ngā āhuatanga neke pērā i te confetti. Hei whakahohonu anō, whakahekehia te neke iti iho i ō tautuhinga ārahinga pūnaha.
notfound.heading: 404: Ngaro i te Moana
notfound.body: Kāore tēnei whārangi e noho ana. Hoki atu ki te whārangi kāinga.
party.announce_full: Kua whakahohea te aratau pāti! Kua huri te momotuhi ki Comic Sans. Kua huri ngā tae ki he ōrite tae mārohirohi matapōkere. Ka hinga confetti kōura mai i runga o te mata i ngā tae me ngā āhua huhua. He mea māhoe ināianei te ihu rākau.
party.announce_reduced: Kua whakahohea te aratau pāti! Kua huri te momotuhi ki Comic Sans. Kua huri ngā tae ki he ōrite tae mārohirohi matapōkere. He mea māhoe ināianei te ihu rākau. I tāwhewhewhe te confetti i te mea kua whakahohea te huri iti.
kofi.aria: Tautokohia a Mikey ki Ko-fi (ka tuwhera te papa)
kofi.title: Ko-fi hoiho takoha widget
about.what_body: He kohinga kitenga ārahanga mō ngā arotake ā-ringa tēnei. Rapua tāu i kite ai, kimihia he whakaahuatanga e tika ana, ka tāruahia ki tō pūrongo.
about.what_wcag: Ka āpiti tēnei raraunga i ngā Paearu WCAG 2.2 Taumata A me AA, ko te paerewa e whakamahia ana e te nuinga o ngā whakahaere me te tūāpapa mō ngā hiahia ture ārahanga. He iti ngā Paearu Angitu Taumata AAA kua whakauruhia hoki i ngā wāhi e whānuitia ana e te hapori ārahanga te āhua o te hapa.
about.step_1_body: Patohia āu i kite ai — ingoa wāhanga, momo tūāhua, rānei whakamāramatanga ā-māmā.
about.step_2_body: Whakamahia ngā pere Whakaara Whakaarotau/Whakaheke Whakaarotau i ia hua hei whakarite i te raupapa. Whakaarahia hei whakaatu tuatahi. Tauhokohokohia hei huna.
about.step_3_body: Tīpakohia te kitenga e pai ana ki tō kitenga. Ka ōritatia ngā hua e te hāngaitanga.
about.step_4_body: Tāpirihia he tīmatanga wāhi (p.t. "Ao whānui:") rānei whakamahia te AI hei āwhina ki te tūāhua anō i ngā kupu.
about.feature_ai_body: Whakamahia te AI hei tuhi anō i tētahi kitenga mā ōu tuhipoka. Kawea mai tōu ake kī API mai i Anthropic, OpenAI, rānei Google. Ka noho tonu ia i roto i tō pūtirotiro, ā, kāore ia e tukuna ana ki a mātou. Tautuhia ia i
about.feature_languages_body: Ka waatea tēnei kohinga i roto i ngā reo neke atu i te 50 tae atu ki te tautoko RTL mō ngā reo matau-ki-maui. He aroha ōku me te mōhio ki te reo, ki te ahurea, me te mātai reo. Ko te tāpiri i ēnei reo katoa he haerenga tōkeke, he whakamātau wahanga, he rua rēpō wahanga, he ngaro haere i te ara wahanga. He AI i hanga ai i ngā whakamāoritanga, nō reira me mōhio koe ki ērā hapa whakamāori. E hāpai ana ngā whakatikatika. Huria i
about.feature_party_body: Kei ngā tautuhinga. I raro i te Kaupeka. Ka mōhio koe ina kite.
about.feature_a11y_label: Ko te Ārahanga ki Mua, ko te AI ki Muri
about.feature_a11y_body: I hangaia ki WCAG 2.2. Ka whai i te whakahaere arotahi, ngā rohe ora, te whakahaere papapātuhi katoa, te tautoko neke iti iho, me ngā tohu tae kontarahi nui.
about.coming_auth: Waitohu tūāhukahuka ki Google, GitHub rānei ki te tūhono i ō tautuhinga i ngā pūrere.
about.coming_custom: Tāpirihia, whakaarohia ōu ake kitea whakaarite, ka rokirokihia huna ana i te kapua.
about.coming_ai: Ngā kaiwhakarato AI anō: OpenAI, Google Gemini, me ētahi atu.
settings.reset_all: Tautuhi Anō Ngā Tautuhinga & Ūkui Raraunga
settings.confirm_reset_all_heading: Tautuhi Anō Ngā Tautuhinga me te Ūkui Raraunga
settings.confirm_reset_all_body: Ka ūkui tēnei i ngā tautuhinga katoa — tae atu ki ō kī API — ā ka huri ngā mea katoa ki ngā taurite. Kāore e taea te huri whakamuri.
settings.confirm_reset_all_yes: Āe, tautuhi anō ngā mea katoa
settings.unsaved_body: He hurihanga kāore anō i tiakina. He aha tāu e hiahia ana?
settings.language_changed_announce: Reo: Kua Whakahōuhia, pēhia te pātene Tiaki hei whakau
results.vote_hint: Vote results up or down — higher-rated matches appear first. Star a result to always pin it to the top.
settings.voting_on: Vote controls are visible on each result.
about.step_5_body: Tāruatia ngā whakaahuatanga me ngā tauira whakatika tōtika ki roto i tō ripanga kāpenga rānei pūrongo rānei.
search.view_all_confirm_body: Ka whakaatuhia {count} ngā hua i tēnei whārangi kotahi.
detail.revise_desc_checkbox: Whakaurua ngā Taipitopito Kitea / Whakaahuatanga ki roto i te arotake
detail.revise_fix_checkbox: Whakaurua Ngā Hīkoi Whakatika ki roto i te tūāhua
detail.revise_error_body: I hapa tētahi mea i a e tūāhua ana. Pēhia Tiakina & Tūāhua anō ngā Kōwae Kōwhiria hei whakamātau anō.
settings.api_key_error: Hapa: Me whai kī API ina whakahohehia te AI Āwhina.
error.heading: I Hapa Tētahi Mea
error.body: Kāore i taea te uta i te kohinga kitea. Tirohia tō hononga, ā,
detail.revise_error_invalid_key: He kī API kore māmā rānei kua pau ({provider}). Tirohia anōtia tō kī i roto i Ngā Tautuhinga.
detail.revise_error_rate_limit: Kua tae ki te tepe reiti ({provider}). Taria tētahi wā, ā, whakamātauria anō.
detail.revise_error_service_error: Hapa ratonga {provider} ({status}). Whakamātauria anō i roto i ngā hēkona ruarua.
detail.revise_error_network_error: Kāore he hononga ipurangi. Tirohia tō hononga, ā, whakamātauria anō.
settings.reset_all_announce: Kua Tautuhi Anō Ngā Tautuhinga Katoa, Kua Ūkuia Ngā Raraunga.
about.what_body_2: Ko te ōrite te mea nui, ā, i tēnei ahumahi otirā, i hiahia ahau ki te tūturu ōrite ōku whakaahuatanga o te pānga, te taumaha, ngā whakaahuatanga, me ngā tauira whakatika hangarau ōrite e tūtohu ana. Rapua tēnei kohinga kāinga o ngā tuhinga kitenga ōrite ki WCAG, tīpakohia tētahi e hāngai ana ki tō kitenga, aukati rānei tāpiri raraunga motuhake, ā, tāruatia tōtika ki roto i tō pūrongo arotake.
error.announce: I hē tētahi mea. Kāore i taea te uta i te whare kitenga. Tirohia tō hononga, ka ngana anō.
about.sources_body: Entries are written in plain language, near-duplicates are consolidated, and each is aligned to a specific WCAG success criterion. Sources consulted include:
detail.copy_all_aria: Tāruarua whakaahuatanga me te whakatika whakaarohia ngātahi
detail.copy_all_announce: [EN] Finding Details / Description and Possible Remediation Steps copied
detail.reset_all_fields_aria: Tōrua te whakaahuatanga me te whakatika whakaarohia ki ngā uara taketake
detail.reset_all_fields_announce: [EN] Finding Details / Description and Possible Remediation Steps reset
detail.edit_lang_warning: Edits are session-only — switching language or finding will reset them.
edit.target_dialog_body: You're editing a finding while viewing it in {locale}.
edit.save_as_personal_desc: Stored locally on this device and private to you. Other languages will be AI-translated unless you edit them manually — translations only run during site maintenance.
edit.contribute_desc: Your edit will be queued for the maintainer to review before it becomes part of the shared corpus.
edit.scope_all_langs_desc: Other languages will be re-translated from the updated English on the next translation pass.
edit.personal_ai_warning: Only {locale} will be saved. Other languages will show AI-translated text. Translations are updated only during site maintenance.
edit.en_switch_dialog_body: Your {locale} version is saved. Here's the English version of the same finding. Make any edits and save, or skip to leave the English version unchanged.
settings.wcag_filter_desc: Show or hide entries introduced in each WCAG version.
results.copy_link_aria: [EN] Copy link to these search results
search.hint_pin: [EN] Pin any result to keep it at the top across all views.
about.feature_pinning_body: Pin any finding to keep it at the top across all searches and views. Use the priority arrows to rank others, star to float a finding to the very top, or archive to remove it from view.
settings.pinned_results_desc: Items you've pinned appear above all search results.
settings.agentic_mode_desc: AI will search your corpus to match your style and technical depth when rewriting.
detail.agentic_mode_help: AI searches the corpus to match your style and depth when rewriting
detail.agentic_mode_hint: AI will search the corpus to match your established style and technical depth
common.sponsored_body: Whiwhi pānui mai i ngā kamupene i roto i ngā hapori āheitanga me ngā kaipanga. Ka whakamānawatia tō tūmataiti, kāore he aroturuki, kāore he kōtaha, kāore he algorithm.
onboarding.heading: Nau mai ki A11yFred
onboarding.confirm_body: Kāore koe i tae ki te mutunga o te haerenga. Katia ināianei ā preki i te toenga?
onboarding.slide_1_body: Whakaahua i tāu i kite ai: he ingoa tūāhua, he tohu, rānei he paearu angitu WCAG. Whakamahia ngā tātari Papatahi me te Taumata WCAG hei whakakita i te kohinga. Whakamahia Whakakita Ngā Hua hei tātari i ngā mea e kitea ana. Ka raupapahia ngā hua e te hāngaitanga, ā, e te taumaha.
onboarding.slide_2_body: Whakamahia Rank Up/Down hei raupapa ngā hua e te hiranga. Whetūria he kitenga kia kitea tonu i runga ake. Pine he kitenga kia noho tonu ki runga i ngā rapunga katoa.
onboarding.slide_3_body: Huakina he kitenga kia kitea tōna taitara, paearu WCAG, whakaahuatanga, me te whakatika i tūtohungia. Tāpirihia he kuputohu tūnga ki te whakaahuatanga (tauira: 'Ao whānui:'). Whakamahia te AI Assist ki te tātiritiri i tētahi āpure mā ō tuhipoka, ka tāruatia ngā āpure takitahi, ka mutu whakamahia te Tārua Katoa ki te tango i ngā mea katoa i tētahi wā.
search.narrow_clear_aria: Ūkui tātari whakakita ā tautuhi anō
search.hint_platform_native_caveat: He iti ake te urupare tono taura kē i tō te tukutuku.
search.hint_ranking: Whakamahia Rank Up/Down hei tāutu i te raupapa hua. Whetūria he hua kia kitea tonu i runga ake.
search.hint_syntax_prefix: Whakamahia +kupu hei hiahia kupu me -kupu hei kore (hei tauira
search.narrowing_results: E whakakita ana i ngā hua
search.narrow_placeholder: Tātarihia i roto i ngā hua {count}…
search.narrow_clear_and_reset_aria: Ūkui tātari whakakita ā hoki ki te rapunga katoa
search.view_all_confirm_filters_label: Ngā tātari e whakamahia ana ināianei:
search.view_all_confirm_pinned_one: 1 hua kua pinea ā e whakaaturia tonu ana.
search.view_all_confirm_pinned: {count} hua kua pinea ā e whakaaturia tonu ana.
search.view_all_confirm_starred_one: 1 kua whetūria ā ka whakaaturia tonu i runga ake.
search.view_all_confirm_starred: {count} kua whetūria ā ka whakaaturia tonu i runga ake.
search.view_all_confirm_archived_one: 1 kua kēngia ā ka whakaaturia tonu i te mutunga o te rārangi hua.
search.view_all_confirm_archived: Kua tohuhia {count} hei kōpaki, ā, ka puta i te mutunga o te rārangi hua i ngā wā katoa.
search.view_all_confirm_body_one: Ka whakaatu tēnei i te hua 1 anake i tēnei whārangi kotahi.
search.view_all_confirm_dont_ask: Kaua e ui anō ki ahau
results.skip_to_next: Tukipeke ki te hua e whai ake nei
results.sort_live_hint: Kei te mahi te Rapunga Ora. Ka raupapahia ngā hua tōtika i muri i te tāuru, i te huri rānei o tētahi kōwhiringa.
results.summary_query: E whakaaturia ana ngā hua mō '{query}', kua raupapahia mā '{sort}', kua whakakitea mā '{narrow}', {platform}.
results.summary_no_query: Kua raupapahia mā '{sort}', kua whakakitea mā '{narrow}', {platform}.
results.summary_no_narrow: E whakaaturia ana ngā hua mō '{query}', kua raupapahia mā '{sort}', {platform}.
results.sort_smart_info: Ka raupapa te raupapa mātau mā te Taumaha i te tuatahi, kātahi mā tō tohu tūnga whaiaro. Ka puta i te tihi ngā āhuatanga whetūhia; ka puta i raro ngā āhuatanga kōpakihia. Ko tēnei te raupapa taunoa.
results.sort_severity_desc: Taumaha: Nui ki te Tikanga Pai
results.sort_severity_asc: Taumaha: Tikanga Pai ki te Nui
results.sort_wcag_level_info: He tautoko ārahina nā ngā paearu AAA i tēnei kohinga. Ehara i te mea ka tohatoha katoa ngā paearu angitu AAA, ā, ko ētahi urunga kua tohua AAA ka whakaata i ngā tohutohu tikanga pai kē atu i ngā whāinga tūāhuatanga.
results.sort_popularity_info: I tētahi whakahou ā-muri, ka whakaata tēnei i te rongonui o te ao whānui i ruia mai i ngā taunekeneke kaiwhakamahi puta noa i ngā pūkete katoa. I tēnei wā, ko te rongonui e hāngai ana ki te huinga, ā, ka tīmata anō ina kati koe i te tono.
results.rank_hint: Pangaia ngā hua ake, iho rānei hei āta raupapa. Whetūhia hei whakaatu i te tuatahi. Kōpakihia hei huna. (Ka taea te whakahoki.)
results.unpin_from_search: Kua tūtohua tēnei hua. Wetekina kia uru ki ngā hua rapunga.
detail.discard_confirm_heading: Whakakore i te paena o nāianei?
detail.discard_confirm_body: Mā te whakatuwhera i tētahi kitenga hou ka whakakore i tō paena kua hūnaia me ōna hurihanga kāore anō i tiakina.
detail.sources_badge_multiple_aria: Puna: Maha. Tirohia ngā tohutoro ki raro.
detail.include_title_when_copied: Whakaurua te taitara i te tāruaruatanga
detail.include_desc_title_when_copied: Whakaurua te taitara Whakaahuatanga i te tāruaruatanga
detail.include_fix_title_when_copied: Whakaurua te taitara Whakatika Whakaarohia i te tāruaruatanga
detail.ai_revision_hint: Tīpakohia ngā māra e hiahia ana koe ki te tiakina mā ngā pouaka tīpako o runga ake, tāpirihia ōu tuhipoka ki konei, ā, ka tuhi anō ai te AI i ērā māra. Hei huri i te tauira AI, hei huri rānei i tēnei, haere ki
detail.finding_note_hint: Tāpirihia he horopaki ki konei: te wāhi, ngā tuhipoka whakahī, me ērā atu mea motuhake ki te kaupeka. Whakahohea AI Assist i
detail.finding_note_hint_suffix: ā, ka tuhi anō ia i runga i ōu tuhipoka.
detail.ai_revision_placeholder: tauira: he mea motuhake tēnei ki te pūkoro, he tohutohu take noa te huānga
detail.finding_note_placeholder: tauira: He nui te taumaha, ka kitea puta noa i roto i te rere Urunga. Ka puta pea ngā take iti iho i te whakatikaina o ēnei.
detail.ai_revision_aria: Tiakina ngā tohutohu AI me te tiakina ngā māra kua tīpakohia
detail.ai_revision_error_body: I puta tētahi raruraru i te wā o te tiakina. Pāwhiria Tiaki & Tiakina Ngā Kua Tīpakohia hei whakamātau anō.
detail.ai_revision_error_invalid_key: He kī API kāore i tika, kua pau rānei ({provider}). Tirohia anō tō kī i roto i Ngā Tautuhinga.
detail.ai_revision_error_rate_limit: Kua taea te tepe reiti ({provider}). Tatari ake ka whakamātau anō.
detail.ai_revision_error_service_error: He hapa ratonga {provider} ({status}). Whakamātauria anō i roto i ētahi hēkona.
detail.ai_revision_error_network_error: Kāore he hononga ipurangi. Tirohia tō hononga ka whakamātau anō.
detail.ai_revision_error_api_error: He hapa ohorere noa mai i {provider} (HTTP {status}).
help.take_tour_description: Whakahokia mai te tereata whakauru hei āta mātai anō i te mahi a A11yFred.
help.step_1_body: Ka puta ngā hua i a koe e patopato ana. Whakamahia te pātuitui Papatūāhi i ngā Tautuhinga hei kōwhiri i ngā kitenga Tukutuku Ipurangi rānei Taupānga ā-Ira (ko te nuinga he arotahi tukutuku). Whakamahia te +kupu hei hiahia kupu, me te -kupu hei whakakorea (hei tauira: keyboard +screen reader -wcag2.2).
help.step_2_body: He pātene Whakaara Ake me te Whakaara Iho ō ia hua, ō ia hua hei huri i tōna tūnga rarangi. Whetūhia he hua kia puta tonu ia ki runga rawa. Whakapinea tētahi hua hei giù mau ki runga puta noa i ngā rapunga katoa.
help.step_3_body: Tīpakohia te kitenga e tino hāngai ana ki tāu i kite ai. Ka rarangahia ngā hua mā te hāngaitanga ki mua, kātahi ka mā te taumaha.
help.step_4_body: Tāpirihia he kuputohu tūnga ki te whakaahuatanga (tauira: 'Ao whānui:' rānei 'Kete:'). Mēnā kei te whakaohotia te AI Assist, tāpiria ō tuhipoka ki te āpure Tuhipoka Tātiritiri, ā, ka tuhia anō e te AI te kitenga kia hāngai ki tō horopaki.
help.step_5_body: Tāruahia te whakaahuatanga me te whakatikatika tūtohutia ki tō ripanga tātai rānei pūrongo. Whakamahia te Tārua Katoa hei hopuku i ngā āpure e rua i tōtika.
help.shortcuts_note: Ka mahi noa ngā ara poto ina noho ana te arotahi ki runga i te rārangi hua. Whakamahia rātou hei hūpeke tere me te aromatawai kitenga me te kore rawa e wehe i te rārangi.
help.shortcut_s: S = Whetūhia te hua o nāianei
help.shortcut_e: E = Pukapukahia te hua o nāianei
help.shortcut_u: U = Wetehia i te pukapuka te hua o nāianei
help.shortcut_rank_up: Shift + ↑ = Whakaara ake te hua o nāianei
help.shortcut_rank_down: Shift + ↓ = Whakaara iho te hua o nāianei
about.what_body_2_prefix: Ko ngā take ōrite ka puta i runga i tōpuni o ngā pae katoa. Ka āta pupuri tēnei taputapu i ōu whakaahuatanga kia ōrite i ngā pūrongo katoa kia kore ai koe e tuhi i te timatanga i ia wā, i ia wā. I hangaia te kohinga mai i ngā mahi arotake ā-mahi, ā, i whakamāmāhia ai e te AI mō te reo māmā, te ōrite, te tika, me te arotake mōhiohio ki
about.feature_agentic_label: Whakahāngaia ki te Kāhua o Mua
about.feature_agentic_body: Mēnā ka whakamahia ana e koe a Claude (Anthropic), ka taea hoki te whakahohonu i te Whakahāngai ki te Kāhua o Mua. Ka rapua e te AI ngā tauira whakatikatika o mua hei hāngai ki te reo me te hōhonu kua whakatūria e koe, kaua ko te tuhi anō noa iho o te kitenga o nāianei.
about.sources_intro: Ko ngā puna ka tae atu ki:
about.examples_ath001_label: Pātene rānei Hononga Kāore i Tapaina
about.examples_ath010_label: Ka Whakaahua te Tapanga Mana i te Āhua, Kaua ko te Tikanga
about.examples_ath014_label: Kāore he H1 i runga i te Whārangi
settings.party_confirm_body: Ka tino whakamāuiui ngā mea katoa, ā, tērā pea ka kore e ārahika.
settings.language_rhg_body_1: He AI i hanga ai tēnei whakamāoritanga, ā, kāore anō i arotakehia e ngā kaikōrero taketake Rohingya.
settings.language_rhg_body_2: Kua wheturangia te iwi Rohingya e te kohuru whakaiwi me te nehunehu whakahau. Me whakamahi tūāpono tēnei whakamāoritanga, ā, whakaarohia te tāpiri whakatikatika mēnā e taea ana e koe.
settings.platform_all_desc: Whakakitea ngā hua katoa puta noa i ngā tukutuku, taupānga ā-ira, me ngā tuhinga.
settings.platform_document_desc: Whakakitea ngā hua e hāngai ana ki ngā tuhinga.
settings.ranking_on: Ka kitea ngā āta rarangi i ia hua.
settings.starred_results_desc: Ka ara ake ngā mea whetūria ki runga rawa, i te raupapa i whetūria ai.
settings.archived_results_desc: Ka puta ngā mea kēngia ki raro rawa o ngā hua.
settings.rankings_desc: Ngā rarangi runga me raro kua homai e koe ki ngā hua. Ko te hua teitei ake i ērā atu, ka puta wawe ake i roto i ngā kimi.
settings.confirm_reset_all_item_api_keys: Ngā kī API kaiwhakarato AI katoa
settings.confirm_reset_all_item_frequenc: Raraunga auautanga whakamahi (ngā tuwhera, ngā tāruatanga)
settings.confirm_reset_all_keep_item_cor: Ō urunga me ō whakatikatika whaiaro
